LineComment.Text: POSALUX Swiss SA / (C) Copyright 2024
Title: Affichage Alarmes/Messages Safety
Comment/Function:
Author: Michel FAIVRE
Engineering: TIA Portal v17
Change log table:
Version | Date | Expert in charge | Changes applied
01.01.00 | 20241218 | FMI | First released version
Warning 700236 : Shutter ready to open, press laser button
Warnings Doors
Warning 700542 : SAFETY : FEED STOP FOR ALL AXIS, MAIN DOOR IS CLOSED BUT NOT LOCKED
Control Front Door locked
Warning 700532 : SAFETY : COMMISSIONNING ON
Warning 700533 : SAFETY : LASER POWER SUPPLY IN EMERGENCY STOP
Warning 700534 : SAFETY : LASER SETTING MODE IS ACTIVE
Warning 700535 : SAFETY : LASER SHUTTER IS CLOSED
Warning 700536 : SAFETY : FEED STOP FOR ALL AXIS, PLEASE TURN SETTING KEY TO MOVE AXIS
Warning 700550 : SAFETY : KEY LASER OFF
Warning 700551 : SAFETY : KEY LASER ON BUT LASER NOT READY
Warning 700552 : SAFETY : KEY LASER ON, LASER READY, SHUTTER CLOSED BY SOURCE
A implementer si l'entrée I0.7 SHUTTER IS CLOSED existe
"LBP_AlarmMsgs".UserA[5].A70UUxx[52] := "Main_Safety_RTG1_DB".SAFETY_LASER_KEY_ON
AND "Main_Safety_RTG1_DB".sLaserSupplyPower
AND "Main_Safety_RTG1_DB".SAFETY_EMERGENCY_STOP_POWER_LASER
AND (Shutter_is_closed) ;
Alarm 700500 : SAFETY : EMERGENCY STOP IS ACTIVE, PLEASE RESET
"LBP_AlarmMsgs".UserA[5].A70UUxx[0] := "DB_DataFromSafety".AckEmergencyStop;
Alarm 700501 : SAFETY : LASER POWER SUPPLY IS OFF, PLEASE RESET
"LBP_AlarmMsgs".UserA[5].A70UUxx[1] := NOT "DB_DataFromSafety".oContactorLaser;
Alarm 700502 :SAFETY : LASER POWER SUPPLY IS NOT READY , PLEASE RESET
Alarm 700508 : SAFETY : FEEDBACK CONTACTOR POWER MACHINE IS NOT WORKING , PLEASE RESET
Alarm 700509 : SAFETY : FEEDBACK CONTACTOR POWER LASER IS NOT WORKING , PLEASE RESET
Alarm 700510 : SAFETY : FEEDBACK CONTACTOR OPEN SHUTTER IS NOT WORKING , PLEASE RESET
Alarm 700511 : SAFETY : FATAL ERROR ! : WRONG DISCORDANCE BEETWEEN SAFETY INPUTS, PLEASE RESET AND CHANGE SETTINGS
